title: Maki Harukawa Player Damage Sound
description: Replaces the player damage sound with Maki Harukawa’s voice from Danganronpa V3.
body:
# ⚔️ Maki Harukawa Player Damage Sound

This resource pack replaces the default player damage sounds with **Maki Harukawa's voice** from *Danganronpa V3: Killing Harmony*. Perfect for fans who want to add a touch of Danganronpa personality to their Minecraft experience!

---

## 🎧 Voice Variations
There are **2 different voice variations** included! You can preview both sounds before downloading below:

### 🇺🇸 English Version:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KX3rGlJavdg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### 🇯🇵 Japanese Version:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bF_lTvhgUa8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## 📦 Features
* **Custom Audio:** High-quality voice lines from Maki Harukawa.
* **Compatibility:** Works on all Minecraft versions compatible with this resource pack.
* **Lightweight:** Simple and easy to use — just install and enjoy!

---

## 🛠️ Installation
1.  Download the **.zip** file.
2.  Place it in your `resourcepacks` folder:
    > `.minecraft/resourcepacks`
3.  Launch Minecraft.
4.  Go to **Options** > **Resource Packs**, and enable **Maki Harukawa Player Damage Sound**.
5.  Enjoy!

---

## 🧠 Notes
* This pack **only** changes the player damage sound.
* It is compatible with other texture and sound packs as long as they don't modify the same sound file.

---

## ❤️ Credits
* **Voice:** Maki Harukawa (*Danganronpa V3: Killing Harmony*)
* **Pack Created by:** Tonlocalbytes

---
*If you like this pack, feel free to leave a ⭐ or follow for more updates!*
